pairs.feature: A portable solar panel that folds into a compact case and charges mobile phones via USB-C
pairs.patent_language: a portable photovoltaic charging device comprising a foldable solar panel assembly and a USB-C output port configured to charge mobile electronic devices
pairs.claim_element: a foldable photovoltaic panel assembly configured to charge a portable electronic device via a USB connector

pairs.feature: integrated battery pack for storing solar energy
pairs.patent_language: a rechargeable energy storage unit comprising a battery pack disposed within the housing, wherein the battery pack is configured to store photovoltaic energy
pairs.claim_element: a rechargeable battery unit disposed within the housing, wherein the battery unit stores electrical energy generated by the photovoltaic cells

pairs.feature: solar panel folds into compact case
pairs.patent_language: a compact portable device comprising a foldable solar panel configured to pivot between a collapsed storage position and an expanded charging position
pairs.claim_element: a portable solar charging device comprising a foldable panel pivotally connected to a housing

pairs.feature: USB-C charging port for mobile phones
pairs.patent_language: a Universal Serial Bus Type-C charging interface disposed on the housing, configured to supply electrical power to a connected mobile device
pairs.claim_element: an output connector comprising a Universal Serial Bus interface configured to supply power to an external device

pairs.feature: energy storage when sunlight is not available
pairs.patent_language: an energy storage module operably coupled to the photovoltaic cells, configured to store electrical energy during periods of insufficient solar irradiance
pairs.claim_element: a power storage module operably coupled to the solar cells for storing harvested energy during periods of reduced solar irradiance

pairs.patent_language: a portable solar power bank comprising a foldable photovoltaic panel array connected to the housing by a hinge mechanism
pairs.claim_element: a photovoltaic module comprising at least two rigid solar panels connected by a hinge mechanism

pairs.feature: A portable solar panel battery charger
pairs.patent_language: a portable solar panel battery charger
pairs.claim_element: a method of processing image data comprising receiving a digital image, applying a convolutional filter, and outputting a feature map
a database indexing method comprising creating a B-tree index on a column of a relational database

pairs.feature: foldable solar panel for mobile charging
pairs.patent_language: a foldable solar panel for mobile charging
pairs.claim_element: a pharmaceutical compound comprising a benzene ring substituted at the para position with a hydroxyl group
